data.name: Jin Ping Mei
data.detailed_description: "Jin Ping Mei" is an SLG game. You were born into a merchant family. Your parents died early, leaving him a pharmacy. You will not only meet but also fall in love with 9 beauties with completely different personalities and styles, eventually embark on an immersive and sweet journey one after another...
data.about_the_game: "Jin Ping Mei" is an SLG game. You were born into a merchant family. Your parents died early, leaving him a pharmacy. You will not only meet but also fall in love with 9 beauties with completely different personalities and styles, eventually embark on an immersive and sweet journey one after another...
data.short_description: This game is adapted from the classic novel Jin Ping Mei. The protagonist was born in a merchant family. His parents died young and left him a pharmacy. On his 25th birthday, he made a vow: I will spend the rest of my life with wives and concubines, rich as hell...
